Brand Identity Guidelines · 2024
GET LOUD.
GET GOING.

Vodka · Premix · Electrolytes · 4.8% ABV · 275mL

Scroll
01 / Brand Identity

THE BRAND
IN THREE
WORDS.

LOUD
FLAVOURED
UNIGNORABLE

BRAND MISSION

Gee Up makes the moment louder. Flavour-first, colour-coded vodka premixes that are designed for the feed, the fridge, and the festival. Every bottle is a vibe in itself.

TARGET AUDIENCE

18–28 year oldsFestival-goersSocial drinkersContent creatorsNight-out startersGaming sessionsConvenience storesTikTok / Instagram
02 / Logo System
On Black — Primary Use
On White — Secondary Use
On SKU Colour — Campaign Use
X
X
X
X

CLEAR SPACE RULE

Always maintain a minimum clear space equal to the cap height of the "G" in the Gee Up logotype. This space must be free of text, imagery, and other graphic elements. The dashed boundary shown represents the minimum exclusion zone.

SOUR WATERMELON
Body / UI Text

Barlow Condensed
Google Fonts · Body
18–20px — Body copy
14–16px — UI labels
12px — Metadata / fine print
Best served cold. Not your
average Friday night drink.
Type Scale Specimen
96PXGEE UP
64PXCOTTON CANDY CRUSH
48PXVODKA · PREMIX · ELECTROLYTES
24PXBest served ice cold at the festival, pregame, or wherever the night takes you.
16PX4.8% ABV · 275mL · Contains electrolytes · Vodka premix · Gluten free · No artificial colours in Cotton Candy Crush and Bubble G Burst

06 / Brand Voice & Personality
LOUD

Never whispers. Always announces.

PLAYFUL

Life's too short for boring drinks.

REBELLIOUS

Rules? Optional. Vibes? Mandatory.

YOUTHFUL

Permanently 23 years old.

ENERGETIC

Pre-drinks that actually pre-drink.

CHAOTIC

Beautifully unhinged.

✓
WRITE LIKE THIS
CAPTION

Your pre-drinks just got an upgrade 🔥 GEE UP. #LetsGeeUp

AD COPY

5 flavours. Zero chill. Pick your vibe.

TAGLINE

Get Loud. Get Going. Get Gee Up.

✕
NOT LIKE THIS
TOO CORPORATE

Gee Up Vodka Premix offers a premium drinking experience.

TOO VAGUE

Refreshing. Fruity. Affordable.

WRONG TONE

Our product is available at select retail outlets nationwide.

DO'S

Use on dark or black backgrounds

Let the bottle color lead the visual

Pair with bold, compressed type

Use saturated photography with contrast

Lean into the chaos — it's the brand

Crop product shots tight and dramatic

DON'TS

Never place logo on busy backgrounds

Never use muted or desaturated tones

Never use thin or serif typefaces

Never reduce colour vibrancy in print

Never add drop shadows to the logo

Never mix SKU colours in one layout

07 / Photography & Imagery

PRODUCT IS
THE HERO.

The bottle is the star of every frame. Gee Up imagery is clean, colour-saturated, and product-centric. The background should always serve the bottle — never compete with it.

Backgrounds: Pure white, solid black, or the SKU's dark colour variant
Lighting: High-key studio or dramatic backlighting that emphasises the liquid colour
Composition: Centred single bottle or 5-bottle lineup at equal angles
Post-processing: Saturated, high-contrast, minimal grain. Colour accuracy is critical.
Avoid: Lifestyle clutter, natural grain textures, earthy tones, muted filters
Cotton Candy Crush
Sour Watermelon
Grape
Green Apple
08 / Brand Applications
COTTON CANDY CRUSH
INSTAGRAM / SOCIAL POST

1080×1080px. Product-centred. SKU background colour. Bold name lockup. No lifestyle clutter.

BUBBLE G BURST
TIKTOK / REELS THUMBNAIL

9:16 aspect ratio. Bold hook text. Bottle in first frame. High-energy transitions. Flavour colour dominant.

GREEN APPLE
RETAIL / POS DISPLAY

A3 shelf talkers. Wobblers. Fridge door clings. Use the SKU's full colour range. White logo out.

🎪
Festival Activation

Experiential, high-energy, all 5 SKUs on display. Full colour immersion.

🏪
Convenience Retail

Cold fridge placement. Colour block merchandising. Bold shelf talkers.

📱
Social Media

IG/TikTok. Product-hero content. UGC encouraged. #LetsGeeUp

🌃
Nightlife Pre-Drinks

Dark, neon-lit contexts. Club colours. Youth group scenarios.
